heading: Omitted
label: 161 to 170a Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 161 to 170a, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 161, , , named Governor as the ex officio superintendent of public instruction and empowered him to prescribe rules and regulations for examination and qualification of teachers.act Jan. 27, 1905, ch. 277, § 333 Stat. 617Section 162, acts , ; , , authorized establishment of school districts in towns.Jan. 27, 1905, ch. 277, § 433 Stat. 617Mar. 3, 1905, ch. 149133 Stat. 1262Section 163, acts , ; , , provided for school boards, their term of office and expenditures.Jan. 27, 1905, ch. 277, § 433 Stat. 617Mar. 3, 1905, ch. 149133 Stat. 1262Section 164, acts , ; , , empowered school boards to employ teachers and to provide for heating and lighting schoolhouses.Jan. 27, 1905, ch. 277, § 433 Stat. 617Mar. 3, 1905, ch. 149133 Stat. 1262Section 165, , , required clerks of school districts to report to the Governor.act Jan. 27, 1905, ch. 277, § 633 Stat. 619Section 166, , , authorized establishment of school districts outside incorporated towns.act Jan. 27, 1905, ch. 277, § 533 Stat. 617Section 167, , , provided for manner of election of school boards in school districts outside incorporated towns.act Jan. 27, 1905, ch. 277, § 533 Stat. 617Section 168, acts , ; , , directed Governor to assign proportion of Alaska fund to school districts.Jan. 27, 1905, ch. 277, § 533 Stat. 617June 1, 1938, ch. 31252 Stat. 607Section 169, , , related to education of white children, Eskimos, and Indians.act Jan. 27, 1905, ch. 277, § 733 Stat. 619Section 170, , , authorized legislature to establish schools for white and colored children and to appropriate funds for that purpose.act Mar. 3, 1917, ch. 16739 Stat. 1131Section 170a, , , authorized Secretary of the Interior to enter into contracts with local school boards for education of children of nontaxpaying natives.act May 14, 1930, ch. 273, § 146 Stat. 321
